name: Subaru Awa
description: __Height:__ 158 cm A girl who attends an entertainment school. She's appeared in commercials and has a promising future ahead of her. She is a beautiful girl who could become a model, and is good at socialising and is very graceful. But, inside she is actually strong-willed and competitive.

In spite of her young age, she is quite clever in setting up traps, and likes to practice on Keiichi. Despite her extremely energetic and playful disposition she is actually quite the crybaby, which Mion and Keiichi often tease her about. name: Botan

Botan is cheerful, sometimes sarcastic, and a completely atypical version of Death (something the main character Yusuke Urameshi points out almost immediately after meeting her). name: Kushina Uzumaki
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Kushina Uzumaki is a ninja of the former Land of the Whirlpool. She had a son, Naruto Uzumaki, with the Hokage of the time, Minato Namikaze. She is noted to have had a brash, tomboyish demeanor, long red hair, and as time passed, blossomed into a very beautiful woman. Despite Naruto's close resemblance to his father, much of his personality and choice of ninjutsu are said to be similar to that of his mother's. She is presumed to be dead, as she is described in the past tense.

description: The old Band of the Hawk's friendly mediator.
